languages.text: "Желаешь продолжить беседу в более личном ключе? Небольшой променад с видом на театр боевых действий нам не повредит". {n}Ювенна берет вас под локоть, лукаво улыбаясь.{/n} "Идем".
languages.translation_comment: Стартуем DL_ConspiratorsCouncil, телепортируемся на север внешнего двора, автоматически стартует DL_JuvennaConspiracyDiscussion_dialogue
Стартуем DL_ConspiratorsCouncil, телепортируемся на север внешнего двора, автоматически стартует DL_JuvennaConspiracyDiscussion_dialogue

languages.text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."
languages.original_text: "Желаешь продолжить беседу в более личном ключе? Небольшой променад с видом на театр боевых действий нам не повредит". {n}Ювенна берет вас под локоть, лукаво улыбаясь.{/n} "Идем".

traits.locale_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."
"Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."
"Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."

languages.text: «¿Le gustaría continuar esta conversación de forma más personal? Un pequeño paseo para reconocer el teatro de operaciones no nos hará ningún daño». {n}Juvenna te coge del brazo con una sonrisa ladina{/n}. «Vamos».
languages.original_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."

traits.locale_text: «¿Le gustaría continuar esta conversación de forma más personal? Un pequeño paseo para reconocer el teatro de operaciones no nos hará ningún daño». {n}Juvenna te coge del brazo con una sonrisa ladina{/n}. «Vamos».

languages.text: “不如我们私下再聊聊？出去散散步，看看战场形势，反正对我们也没什么坏处。”{n}尤文娜挽住你的手臂，狡黠地笑了笑。{/n}“走吧。”
languages.original_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."

traits.locale_text: “不如我们私下再聊聊？出去散散步，看看战场形势，反正对我们也没什么坏处。”{n}尤文娜挽住你的手臂，狡黠地笑了笑。{/n}“走吧。”

languages.text: « Que diriez-vous de poursuivre cette conversation en privé ? Une petite promenade nous ferait le plus grand bien, en plus de nous offrir une vue d'ensemble du théâtre des hostilités. » {n}Juvenna prend votre bras avec un sourire en coin.{/n} « Venez. »
languages.original_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."

traits.locale_text: « Que diriez-vous de poursuivre cette conversation en privé ? Une petite promenade nous ferait le plus grand bien, en plus de nous offrir une vue d'ensemble du théâtre des hostilités. » {n}Juvenna prend votre bras avec un sourire en coin.{/n} « Venez. »

languages.text: "Bu konuşmaya daha kişisel bir tonda devam etmek ister misiniz? Savaş meydanını seyretmek için yapacağımız küçük bir yürüyüşün zararı dokunmaz." {n}Juvenna, kurnazca gülümseyerek kolunuza giriyor.{/n} "Gelin."
languages.original_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."

traits.locale_text: "Bu konuşmaya daha kişisel bir tonda devam etmek ister misiniz? Savaş meydanını seyretmek için yapacağımız küçük bir yürüyüşün zararı dokunmaz." {n}Juvenna, kurnazca gülümseyerek kolunuza giriyor.{/n} "Gelin."

languages.text: "Wollt Ihr diese Unterhaltung in einer etwas persönlicheren Atmosphäre fortsetzen? En kleiner Spaziergang durch das Kampfgebiet wird uns nicht schaden." {n}Juvenna reicht dir mit einem verschlagenen Lächeln den Arm.{/n} "Kommt."
languages.original_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."

traits.locale_text: "Wollt Ihr diese Unterhaltung in einer etwas persönlicheren Atmosphäre fortsetzen? En kleiner Spaziergang durch das Kampfgebiet wird uns nicht schaden." {n}Juvenna reicht dir mit einem verschlagenen Lächeln den Arm.{/n} "Kommt."

languages.text: 「この会話をもっと個人的な方向に続けましょうか？戦場の舞台を眺めながら少し散歩するのも悪くないでしょう。」{n}ユベナはあなたの腕を掴み、にやりと笑います。{/n}「さあ、行こう。」
languages.original_text: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."
